votes.rationale: WS-C deliverable complete: topology-plan.schema.yaml and wave-model.schema.yaml committed. execution_scope derivation rule established (repo_local vs cross_repo from topology shape). Wave model is proof-based with 5 waves and entry_wave rules by project_type.
Wave advancement is proof-gated, not calendar. entry_wave rules are correct per project_type. Topology derivation boundary between planner and intake is clearly drawn. No implementation overreach.
Topology and wave model are coherent and consistent with WS-A and WS-B inputs. Cross_repo vs repo_local derivation is unambiguous.
